title: Seclusion
overview: It's been a terrible year for Mary. Broke up with her partner, lost her job, so she decides to take what's left of her life and flee. Hitting the road to find adventure, she comes across a secluded mansion, boarded up, that appears empty. Breaking in, Mary soon discovers the mansion hides a secret, and that it's been boarded up for a sinister reason. Realizing she is not alone, Mary must figure out how to survive her seclusion.
